summary: 3-Section Kanban Card Layout Testing Complete - All 12/12 features verified. Cards show proper 3-section layout: (1) Header with logo+name+priority badge, (2) Status with dot+label+context, (3) Action section below subtle 1px divider with last activity, urgency time, and conditional next step.
critical_code_review_comments: 3-section layout properly implemented with Header, Status, and Action sections
Priority badge shows TOP/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW with correct color coding (indigo/teal/slate/light-slate)
Action section has proper border-top divider: 1px solid rgba(226,232,240,0.5)
Action section styling: marginTop:8px, paddingTop:7px, paddingLeft:32px
Time urgency colors correct: red (#dc2626) for overdue, muted for no urgency
LOW priority items correctly hide Next step (Feature 8 verified)
Card container styling maintained: white bg, 10px radius, shadow, grab cursor, 8px gap
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3-section Kanban card layout complete. Test IDs: card-name-*, card-priority-*, card-status-*, card-context-*, card-action-section-*, card-time-*, card-next-*. 7 cards tested. Creighton (LOW) correctly hides Next step. All overdue items show red urgency color. Priority view (list) unchanged.

verified_features.1_header_section: PASS - Header shows logo + name + priority badge right-aligned
verified_features.2_priority_badge: PASS - Shows TOP/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW with color coding
verified_features.3_status_section: PASS - Status shows colored dot + label
verified_features.4_optional_context: PASS - 2 cards have context ('Ready for first contact', 'Coach assigned a task')
verified_features.5_action_divider: PASS - Action section below 1px border-top divider (marginTop:8, paddingTop:7)
verified_features.6_last_activity_left: PASS - 'Last: Xd ago' or 'Last: No activity' on left side
verified_features.7_time_urgency_right: PASS - Urgency time on right with red for overdue, muted for low
verified_features.8_next_step_conditional: PASS - Next step shown for TOP/HIGH/MEDIUM, hidden for LOW (Creighton)
verified_features.9_card_container: PASS - White bg, 10px radius, shadow, hover state, 8px gap
verified_features.11_cards_clickable: PASS - Card click navigates to detail page
verified_features.12_priority_view_unchanged: PASS - Priority view shows list format (not kanban)
